title: Better Free AI Image than Midjourney?
summary: Jack Roberts claims Ideogram 4.0 excels at rendering text within images, surpassing Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on design benchmarks, and offers this capability at no cost. The video positions Ideogram 4.0 as a free alternative for generating logos, signs, and infographics with accurate text rendering.
writeup: The video reviews Ideogram 4.0 as a free text-to-image tool, with Jack Roberts arguing it renders text inside images more accurately than Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro. The focus is design output: logos, signs, and infographics where legible, correctly spelled text is the differentiator. The central claim is that Ideogram 4.0 leads on design benchmarks for text rendering while remaining available at no cost.
